{{Quote|This is private vessel Lark, property of the Camblian Order on the planet Eedoq.|Pilot of the Lark|<ref name="E9" />}}
'''Eedoq''' was a [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] [[Tantra sector/Legends|Tantra sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Eedoq was the homeworld of the [[Camblian Order]], which, shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] around in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], sent 309 prospective students to be enrolled at the [[Clarion Scholars Academy]] on the planet [[Daemen]]. However, their transport ship, the ''[[Lark]]'', was destroyed during the journey by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] pilot [[Tars Nandy]], resulting in the deaths of all 309 children.<ref name="E9" />

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 9|''Empire'' 9]] {{Mo}}
